summary: Trading reliability fixes, chart-line stability, and launcher quality-of-life improvements.
release_notes: Improved fill handling and position reconstruction so rapid close/re-entry flows no longer drift from TWS state.
Order-line rendering now supports per-chart visibility reliably, including redraw stability and duplicate-line prevention during settings changes and refreshes.
Auto-exit lines were hardened for multi-chart rendering and refresh restoration behavior.
Settings behavior was refined so non-connection tabs are hidden only when the disconnected overlay is active.
Windows launcher now respects saved startup connection preferences and keeps only the latest local launcher log session.
Auto-exit subrow now shows a left-side arrow indicator (↳) to visually relate it to the parent order above.
